programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Richard Sarvate quit his ten year programming career in Silicon Valley to be a stand up comedian. Oops! Now he spends his nights poking fun at tech jobs.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Iraq War veteran Josh Novey takes the stage with an easy-going presence and jokes about Waffle House, kindly threatening his audience, and tickling grizzly bears.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Who goes from being a mild-mannered nationally recognized college a Capella group vocal percussionist to becoming a high-energy, intelligent, physical, and downright silly beatboxing comedian? None other than Comedian Tyler Boeh, who shifted his focus from singing a Capella (a word he describes as Latin for “Without Girlfriend”) when he won a comedy contest in Portland Oregon. After winning and placing in the finals of numerous Comedy Competitions from San Francisco to Seattle to Boston to The World Series of Comedy, Boeh not only launched a great career in comedy including television appearances, colleges, cruise ships and headlining clubs, he also found a girlfriend. Tyler's comedy CD was chosen by LaughSpin Magazine as the Best Comedy Album of 2012 and you may have seen him on such shows as Celebrity Name Game, Moms Rule, Nesn Comedy All Stars, or heard him on SIRIUS radio. Don't miss a chance to see Tyler live.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Helene brings honesty to the stage that helps everyone relax-- and laugh at the joys and pains of aging, being a married mother of two and all that the generation gap brings!

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Have you ever, as an adult, been bullied by a healthcare professional or popular middle school girl? Andrew has. The comedy of Andrew Hobbs encapsulates the bizarre awkwardness of belated maturity and his attempts to appear in control. Andrew will have you rolling with laughter as he twists a narrative of humor and heart from his own life experiences and observations. His comedy has been featured in comedy festivals across the country. He has been perfecting his craft since childhood and throughout adulthood.

programme.title: Ron Ruhman
programme.desc: Ron has been called a “High Energy Seinfeld”. He brings a very energetic style to the stage as he shares his interesting slant on day-to-day life in an act that is clean, smart, and very entertaining.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Paul was raised as a sports fanatic in the tiny town of Owego, in upstate New York. After four years of playing college basketball, somehow he graduated. Aside from playing in the NBA, his dream job was to talk about sports for a living. Paul then moved to California after landing a television sports anchor job but found out quickly that he was “too much of a smart-ass” for TV news. After he was fired, Paul took his unique sense of humor to comedy club stages all over the country. In 2005, Paul was selected to perform at the HBO Comedy Festival in Las Vegas. Morrissey has also been a finalist in several national comedy competitions including Wendy's Comedy Challenge, Comedy Central's Open Mic Fight and Maxim's Real Men of Comedy.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Jonnie W: Not My Cup of Tea
programme.desc: Jonnie W addresses the Tennessee-born stereotype. Whether or not he matches up to it, his voiced inner monologue is sure to leave you on his side when it comes to new country radio, double decker grave plots, and the difference between fish and beef.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Mike Burton delivers his comedy with high energy, great storytelling, and hilarious facial expressions. Mike started his stand-up comedy career in 1996 first performing in the local clubs in NYC, then gaining nationwide popularity. He has been on TV shows, independent feature films, and commercials for HP and Modells. Mike has also performed in daytime shows: Rachel Ray, The Chew, and ABC's The Revolution.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Half-Persian and raised in a religious family, K-Von's comedy unites sharp cultural riffs with clean delivery. In this special he takes on political correctness, cyber bullying, and the utility of cargo pants.

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this classic cheesy 90's action movie! Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Stone Cold!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this short about the joys of playing music. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Mr. B Natural!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Cyborg Cop 2 is the special kind of terrible movie that has failed before you're even done reading the title. That's right folks, Cyborg Cop 2 does not even manage to contain a single cyborg cop. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of Mystery Science Theater 3000).

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this horror classic about a dead little girl who has an evil clown doll that commands her to kill. That's all well and good. But it's the little things about Ghosthouse that really make you stand up and say “Wait, what?”

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this short about the best way to set up a room. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Setting Up a Room!

programme.title: RiffTrax

programme.title: Blue Iguana
programme.desc: Small-time crooks Eddie and Paul are in over their heads when a cute London lawyer hires them to steal a rare jewel. Meanwhile, a mullet-haired gangster wants the gem for himself. Bullets and sparks fly in this pond-hopping comedic caper.

programme.title: Hard Cash
programme.desc: Just released from prison, master thief Thomas Taylor (Christian Slater) masterminds a scheme to rob an off-track betting operation with his new crew. After discovering that the $1.9 million loot is marked, the crew becomes involved with corrupt FBI Agent Mark Cornell (Val Kilmer), who has some schemes of his own.

programme.title: Grand Isle
programme.desc: Walter (Nicolas Cage) and his neglected wife lure a young man into their Victorian home to escape a hurricane. When the man is charged with murder by Det. Jones (Kelsey Grammar), he must reveal the couple's wicked secrets to save himself.

channel.display-name: Movies on the Rotten Tomatoes Channel

programme.title: Remember the Night
programme.desc: Love blooms between a sympathetic attorney and the comely shoplifter he has taken home for Christmas.

programme.title: This Island Earth
programme.desc: Two researchers are pressed into service by battle-weary aliens on the brink of losing an interplanetary war.

programme.title: Moonrise Kingdom
programme.desc: The story of two 12-year-olds who fall in love, make a secret pact, and run away together into the wilderness.

programme.title: The Killers
programme.desc: An insurance investigator pieces together the events that led up to a boxer's murder.

programme.title: Odd Man Rush
programme.desc: When Harvard hockey's Bobby Sanders lands in Sweden's minor leagues, his relationship with the girl at the local market forces him to confront the reality of his childhood NHL dream before the Hockey Gods intervene.

programme.title: Love Spreads
programme.desc: Glass Hearts are blocked. What will it take to make that crucial second album?

programme.title: Remember Yesterday
programme.desc: When Jenny's childhood sweetheart comes to town, old jealousies are forgiven and Jenny gets 2 second chances.

programme.title: The Score
programme.desc: The Score boldly combines real time heist-thriller suspense with offbeat romance and a killer soundtrack.

programme.title: The Republic of Two
programme.desc: An examination of the high-stakes game of premarital cohabitation. Tim wants to be a doctor. Caroline doesn't quite know what she wants.

programme.title: Hunt for Truth
programme.desc: Carrie Evans, a beautiful young attorney with aspirations to become partner like her fiancee Steven Riggs, learns some disturbing facts about her family and her boss Caswell Foxx as she researches a big case.

programme.title: Hit And Run
programme.desc: A lawyer is riding high after receiving a Not Guilty verdict for her client, but has to look over her shoulder when a woman she meets in a traffic accident is not all she appears to be.

programme.title: My Daddy is In Heaven
programme.desc: Becca and Adam Smith along with their 5-year-old daughter Acie are a perfect family until a tragedy strikes

programme.title: A Royal Makeover
programme.desc: When Ramone discovers he is about to be King, he takes lessons from royal expert Angelica.

programme.title: A Week in Paradise
programme.desc: Seeking solace from a failed marriage, Maggie (Malin Akerman) escapes to the Caribbean for a much-needed reset.

programme.title: Bump In the Night
programme.desc: An alcoholic mother is locked in a desperate search for her missing son and the man who kidnapped him.

programme.title: The Tender Trap
programme.desc: The true story of Sharon Armstrong, Kiwi grandmother and public servant, who became the victim of an online romance scam that almost cost her her freedom.

programme.title: A Lover Betrayed
programme.desc: Inspired by true events. A one-night romance with a handsome soldier turns Tess Ford's life upside down as his attraction to her becomes a frightening obsession.

programme.title: Mother Knows Best
programme.desc: A mother's overpowering aspirations turn deadly, estranging her forever from the daughter whose life she sought to control in this bone-chilling tale of obsession.

programme.title: Man On High Heels
programme.desc: Detective Ji-wook, ruthless in his pursuit of criminals, secretly struggles with his desire to become a woman.

programme.title: Obsessed
programme.desc: Secret and passionate affair between Colonel Jin Pyeong, trapped in a loveless marriage with Soo Jin, and Jong Ga Heun, the Chinese-Korean wife of Captain Kyung Woo Jin happens in the summer of 1969.

programme.title: Pipeline
programme.desc: Korea has over 1,200km of pipeline that acts as the country's artery. There are several individuals who make the headlines by tapping into this network in order to siphon oil. Drill-bit is a drilling prodigy who is offered by Gun-woo, the head of an oil refining company, a large sum of money for completing the impossible heist to drill into the pipeline between Honam and Seoul-Busan highway within a month. To get the job done in time, he puts together a team of misfits: civil engineer ‘Mr. Na', excavation expert ‘Big Shovel', and welding expert ‘Welder'.

programme.title: Urban Myths
programme.desc: 10 different urban tales will take you into the realm of darkness where myth and reality become blurred.

programme.title: Twerk: Reggae Nights
programme.desc: Hard-working, single mother, Iesha, learns that one of the most popular reggae artists, Domino, is holding an audition in her city for dancers in his next music video. The competition is fierce, and some of the ladies will do anything to get the job.

programme.title: When It Rains
programme.desc: While Todd is away at Graduate school to better his family, his wife Janice is back home taking care of her sick mother. The long distance marriage takes a toll on the two. When Todd ends up encountering a woman named Sharon at a bar, sparks fly.

programme.title: Weekend Getaway
programme.desc: Dangerous secrets are revealed when three happily married couples go to a cabin in the woods for one weekend.

programme.title: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Local sheriff, Keith James, finds himself on a desperate hunt for vengeance after the loss of his brother. While solving the case, the truth about his past is revealed, making him and his daughter targets.

programme.title: An American Crime
programme.desc: Gertrude Baniszewski, a divorced mother of several children, agrees to take care of two girls, Sylvia and Jennie, while their parents travel with a carnival. Though her eldest daughter is the real troublemaker, Gertrude vents all her bitterness and frustration on innocent Sylvia. Gertrude imprisons the girl in the basement and tortures her, eventually encouraging her children to follow suit.

programme.title: In Hell
programme.desc: Kyle LeBlanc (Jean-Claude Van Damme) is an honorable citizen who winds up incarcerated in Russia after he takes revenge on the man who murdered his wife, resulting in the killer's death. Unfortunately for Kyle, he is assigned to a prison that is renowned for its violence. Controlled by a corrupt and sadistic warden, the facility regularly holds brutal fights between inmates. In order to survive in the prison, Kyle must participate in the battles, even as he attempts to retain his humanity.

programme.title: Gang of Roses
programme.desc: A gang of gold-hunting outlaws, headed by the ruthless Left Eye Watkins (Bobby Brown), takes over the peaceful town of Flatridge, tearing the sleepy outpost to shreds as they search for riches. They murder a can-can girl, who is the sister of Rachel (Monica Calhoun), the onetime leader of a notorious all-girl gang. Rachel then rounds up her four old associates, and they seek revenge for her sister. Using teamwork and a sassy attitude, Rachel's gang goes up against Watkins' tough crew.

programme.title: The Alternate
programme.desc: The president is kidnapped while attending a charity event. Initially planned by his chief of staff to boost his poll ratings, one of the kidnappers decides the opportunity for gain is too strong and it turns into a real kidnapping. Starring Ice-T.

programme.title: Direct Contact
programme.desc: An American prisoner in a Russian jail is given a chance at freedom if he can rescue a kidnapped woman.

programme.title: Mercenary for Justice
programme.desc: In this crime thriller, mercenary John Seeger (Steven Seagal, "Exit Wounds") attempts to break into Eastern Europe's most impenetrable prison and free the son of a notorious drug lord.

programme.title: Nowhere to Land
programme.desc: After deadly nerve gas is planted on a plane, a pilot must safely land a 747 between Hawaii and LA: the longest flying stretch without a place to land in emergencies. Starring Jack Wagner.

programme.title: Danger Zone
programme.desc: Rick Morgan (Billy Zane), an American engineer who runs a mine in East Africa, is approached one day by his friend Jim Scott (Robert Downey Jr.), who needs someplace to store canisters of toxic waste. Unfortunately, a spill occurs a short time later, resulting in deaths and Morgan having to leave the country. A year later, he is approached by a government agent (Ron Silver) looking for a missing supply of potentially hazardous poison, which in truth hides something even more valuable.

programme.title: Guns N' Roses
programme.desc: With over 100 million albums sold, the world's most dangerous band returns for this historic Sin City takeover! Legendary Rock Band Guns N' Roses have taken the desert by storm and laid claim on Las Vegas' Hard Rock Casino. This absolute ambush on the city of sin, captured in High Definition, puts you in the best seat in the house for an electrifying once in a lifetime live concert performance. Filmed during GNR's Appetite For Democracy residency at The Joint in November 2012, celebrating twenty-five years of "Appetite for Destruction"and four years of "Chinese Democracy", in this elaborate Vegas style production featuring Rock Icon Axl Rose at the top of his game with his current lineup performing some of GNR's biggest hits including "Welcome To The Jungle", "Sweet Child Of Mine", "Mr Brownstone", "November Rain", "Chinese Democracy", "Knockin On Heaven's Door", "Nightrain", 'Civil War", McCartney's "Live And Let Die", "Paradise City", and many more hard rockin hits! This is the first live concert release from Guns N' Roses with it's newest lineup, since Use Your Illusion II in 1992 with GNR's original members. Sin City will never be the same.

programme.title: Rubí: Un nuevo proyecto

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre: Traición y amor
programme.desc: Juan le confiesa a Sofía que nunca ha dejado de amarla, pero ella ya no puede creer en él. Óscar le cuenta a Jimena todo lo relacionado con su divorcio. Fernando decide llevarse lejos a Gabriela para que sus nervios no los delaten.

programme.title: Al diablo con los guapos: Intrigas dolorosas
programme.desc: Durante una cena con Hugo y Alejandro, Florencia confiesa que vio a Mili besando a su esposo. Andrea y Karla le hacen creer a Valeria que Luciana sabe de su noviazgo con Rocky. Hugo y Alejandro vuelven a enfrentarse por el amor de Mili.

programme.title: Vino el amor: Trágica muerte
programme.desc: Fernanda cree que por fin tendrá una familia ahora que David se casará con Graciela. Por otro lado, Brian intenta defender a Marta y Carito de unos maleantes y algo malo sucede.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Catalina le dice a Adolfo que le queda poco tiempo de vida y le pide que la lleve a ciudad Santiago con su madrina. José María le dice a Josefina que se casará, pero que no habrá festejo.

programme.title: Corazón indomable: Necesitas ayuda
programme.desc: El padre le informa a Maricruz que tiene que desalojar el rancho lo antes posible José Antonio se encuentra con Octavio y le informa que Maricruz se va a casar con Álvaro.

programme.title: Destilando amor: Problemas familiares
programme.desc: Sofía le reclama a Rodrigo por alejar a su familia por culpa de Gaviota, él le exige no entrometerse en su vida. Alonso hace un brindis por Gaviota y asegura que es una mujer increíble, ella se pone nerviosa al escuchar sus palabras.

programme.title: Teresa: Falsa amistad
programme.desc: A Mayra se le rompe el corazón al descubrir que Rubén y Genoveva son amantes. Teresa engaña a Fernando diciéndole que está comenzando a enamorarse de él.

programme.title: Rubí: Un nuevo proyecto
programme.desc: Alejandro llega a Cancún y se encuentra con su hermana Sofía y sus papás Don Genaro se enfurece al ver que Luis y Sofía juntos y cree que puede ser descubierto.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Nandito duda de que María lo haya querido salvar y piensa que es una asesina. Soraya confronta a María en la cárcel para provocarla y acusarla de haberla querido matar también. María le reprocha a Luis Fernando su infidelidad.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: La compañera de celda de María resulta ser Penélope, quien empieza a hacerle la vida miserable. Soraya trata de convencer a Luis Fernando que María y Nandito solo querían hacerle daño.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Malvina planea hacer que Mística sea la nueva novia de Jorge Luis. Mística aprovechará la fiesta de Jorge Luis para poder reconquistarlo.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Santiago le propone a Meche que se con él. La madrina de Mística le aconseja que se case con don Sebastián para tener mucho dinero y prestigio. Meche teme que su hermano muera debido a que necesita un tipo de sangre difícil de conseguir.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Sergio conoce a su hija y está decidido a ayudar a Marimar Arturo le confiesa a su mamá y a su hermana que se va a casar.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Sergio descubre que Bella es Marimar y le exige una explicación, pues es el padre de la hija de ella. Bella le dice al gobernador que se casará con él.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Santiago le propone a Meche que se con él. La madrina de Mística le aconseja que se case con don Sebastián para tener mucho dinero y prestigio. Meche teme que su hermano muera debido a que necesita un tipo de sangre difícil de conseguir.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Sergio conoce a su hija y está decidido a ayudar a Marimar Arturo le confiesa a su mamá y a su hermana que se va a casar.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Cynthia se niega a aceptar que Rogelio se casará con Ana Paula. Rogelio viaja en helicóptero con Ana Paula para mostrarle sus tierras. Vanesa enfurece al enterarse de que Rogelio se casará con Ana Paula.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Ana Paula recuerda los bellos momentos que pasó al lado de Gustavo, mientras se prepara para casarse con Rogelio. Efraín le pide a Cynthia que acepte ser su pareja en la boda de Rogelio. Vanesa lleva a cabo sus planes para impedir la boda.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Rogelio le jura a Ana Paula que hará hasta lo imposible por hacerla feliz. Cynthia sospecha que Rogelio en verdad está enamorado de Ana Paula. Rogelio le exige a Bruno que se aleje de Ana Paula.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Rosaura sospecha que Ana Paula está buscando la manera de separarse de Rogelio. Rogelio le pide a Ana Paula una oportunidad para conocerse y llevarse mejor.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Justino intenta matar a Antonia al saber que estaba esperando un hijo de él. Violeta le pide a Mariano que le permita volver a vivir en su casa. Maximiliano siente celos al saber que José María está intentado enamorar a Violeta.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Jesusa le pide a José María que la lleve con Antonia y su familia. Violeta le confiesa a Antonia de las amenazas de Justino y le propone regresar con los Lazcano. Violeta confronta a Julio sobre el trato que hizo con Justino.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Jesusa se reencuentra con Antonia y le da la noticia de que Alejandro rentó su casa. Julio le reclama a Justino que solo lo quiere ayudar porque está interesado en Antonia y esto le trae problemas con Malena. Julio le pide perdón a Antonia.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Justino plena deshacerse de Alejandro, pero Pantaleón se niega a hacerle daño. Leonora accede a que los Madrigal regresen a su casa. Violeta le externa a Max las dudas que tiene acerca de su relación, pero él vuelve a convencerla que la ama.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña: Sacrificio de amor
programme.desc: Valentina le pide a José Miguel que evite encontrarse con Rosendo. Ivana se alegra al saber que, gracias a Toledo, Isabel podría quedar en libertad.

programme.title: La usurpadora: Instinto
programme.desc: Verónica llama a casa de Piedad y ella comienza a sospechar que Carlos Daniel siente algo por ella, pues él se emociona con la llamada. Estefanía disfruta de su nueva vida con Willy y su futuro bebé.

programme.title: El manantial: Balbuceos
programme.desc: El padre Salvador hace alusión a la otra hija de Francisca. Malena conversa con Alejandro sobre los sentimientos de su amiga.

programme.title: Imperio de mentiras: Problemas de dinero
programme.desc: Teresa le da información a Leonardo sobre los 5 millones de pesos. Leonardo investiga y confronta a José Luis sobre el dinero. Majo decide atrapar ella sola a Darío.

programme.title: La Gata: Terrible accidente
programme.desc: Esmeralda es atropellada por un hombre que le ofrece trabajo en su empresa. Por otro lado, Virginia le regala cosas a "Centavito" y Chayo. Además, Pablo le pide casamiento a Esmeralda.

programme.title: La que no podía amar: Celos dañinos
programme.desc: Esteban le confiesa a Rocío el gran interés que siente por ella. Efraín se molesta al saber que Consuelo es ahora novia de Hugo. Cynthia intenta suicidarse al pensar que Gustavo sigue enamorado de Ana Paula.

programme.title: Sortilegio: Espía en la oficina
programme.desc: Bruno piensa utilizar a Katia como espía en la oficina de Alex. Victoria comienza a enamorarse de Fernando. Paula consigue quedarse en casa de Alex. Alex visita a Meche y le pregunta sobre Pedro, pero ella niega conocerlo.

programme.title: Abismo de pasión: Un bebé para Florencia
programme.desc: Paloma sufre al saber que Gael se casará con Elisa. Sabrina le confiesa a Elisa que Paolo la había enamorado para conseguirle un bebé a Florencia.

programme.title: 40 y 20: No me importa que me digan mujeriego
programme.desc: Paco regresa con Miranda, su exnovia, y la lleva a vivir a su casa. Todo va bien hasta que llega Lorena y el mundo se le viene abajo.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Pedro se dedica a buscar mujeres por Facebook, y ante el asombro de Luis, conoce a una chica guapísima Luis tiene curiosidad y decide aplicar la misma técnica para encontrar al amor de su vida.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Silvia, desesperada por conocer hombres, renta una habitación de su departamento por medio de una aplicación un hombre apuesto renta el cuarto, ella se enamora, pero aparece la ex novia y comienzan los problemas.

programme.title: XHDRBZ
programme.desc: Se presenta historia de la película Peter Pun. Peter visita a los niños Wendy, Miguel y Juan, quienes quieren conocer su casa que se encuentra en la playa del Nunca Jamón.

programme.title: XHDRBZ
programme.desc: El rockero Marilin Menson recibe a todo el público cantando irreverente el tema de Pluto. Alejandra Guzmán es la invitada especial en el show de Marilín Menson.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: El patrón le llama a Cipriano y le dice que uno de sus amigos hará su fiesta en el hotel y él piensa que es Serapio, cuando descubre que se equivocó, se arrepiente de haber pagado todo.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: El dueño del hotel le habla a Cipriano para avisarle que grabarán unas escenas para una telenovela. El actor Amalio recibe una suite para que la use como camerino. Carmelo interrumpe una escena para darles unos consejos a los actores.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Vítor acepta tener una cita con una mujer casada y usa a Albertano para distraer a su amiga, pero el esposo de la mujer aparece y tienen que fingir tener una relación.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Dada su experiencia como chofer de microbuses, ahora que es rico, Vítor decide convertirse en piloto de carreras y, con Albertano, crea la escudería "Los Guapos".

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Los niños del barrio apedrean a Ofertín con Albertano dentro. El chino tiene una fiesta y doña Lucha invita a Nayeli. María va a un centro nocturno con sus amigas pero sus acompañantes las dejan con la cuenta.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Rosa cambia el viejo refrigerador de Doña Lucha por uno de nueva tecnología y además parlante, lo cual vuelve loca a Lucha. Maria sorprende a Alberto acaramelado con Gloria y de celos inicia una competencia con Betsabé por un chico guapo.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.sub-title: El regreso de la Licha viviente
programme.desc: La tía Licha regresa de entre los muertos, donde en realidad nunca estuvo. Plácido la corre de la casa, pero la familia se apiada de ella.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Los López reordenan la casa cuando descubren que la tía Licha es su nueva vecina porque heredó el departamento contiguo. Plácido encuentra un nuevo empleo, en el que debe lidiar con una millenial déspota.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche: Regresen a mis hijos
programme.desc: Federica y Ludovico son evaluados por una trabajadora social para verificar si son buenos padres Federica y Ludovico quieren tomar ventaja de que están solos para viajar a Hawai.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Vico le inventa a Rocco que es amante de un anciano y ella es la que le da dinero Sol se enoja al no ser elegida como modelo para una campaña Alma acusa a Reverte de homosexual por acosar a Iñaki Diego amenaza con matar a la profesora Julia.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Gandía le aclara a Alma que Reverte no es homosexual. Alma le confirma a Gandía que Roberta no es su hija. León amenaza a Mabel con lastimar a Diego si se atreve a buscarlo. Diego le exige a Roberta que le diga cómo supo del enema que le hicieron.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: El padre de Sabrina quiere hacerles una entrevista al grupo RBD, lo que pone a los chicos muy felices, pero ella lo que busca es acercarse mas a Miguel.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Diego se enoja con Tomás al descubrir que fue él quien dijo lo de su enema. Celina recrimina a Sol por alejar a Alan de ella. Diego confiesa que extraña a su mamá. Teo golpea a Gastón por maltratar a Jose. Rocco cree que Vico consume drogas.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Las chicas están en una reunión con la maestra Fátima, la cual dice que ella está para dirigirlas en su equipo de porristas sustituyendo a Alma.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta hace un plan para que José tenga una cita en el departamento de Diego y demostrarle a Teo que ya lo olvidó. Mía discute con su padre y él le dice que cambie esa cara pesada.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Sol le dice a Ana que si no ha visto a Celina, aprovecha también para decirle que ella está para servir en la escuela entonces le pide una orden de alimentos larga.

programme.title: Muchacha italiana viene a casarse
programme.desc: Fidel le dice a Eloísa que con la autopsia descubrieron que Dante fue envenenado y Pilar es la principal sospechosa. Fiorella le dice a Pedro que cree que está embarazada. Al mismo tiempo, se entera que podría ser hija de Sergio.

programme.title: Muchacha italiana viene a casarse
programme.desc: Federica es detenida por homicidio e intento de asesinato. Eloísa le dice a Gael que no lo quitará del testamento aunque no sea un Ángeles.

programme.title: Muchacha italiana viene a casarse
programme.desc: El juez le dice a Federica que irá a la cárcel sin derecho a fianza. Por su lado, Eloísa le confiesa a Sergio que ella mató a Máximo. Pedro se alegra al enterarse que Fiorella es hija de Santino.

programme.title: Simplemente María
programme.desc: María tiene que decirle a Juan Pablo que su papá murió. Finalmente, Cristóbal ve su esfuerzo cuando es elegido como nuevo director del colegio donde trabaja.

programme.title: Simplemente María
programme.desc: Adolfo queda impactado con el cambio de María y por ello le pide Alejandro que rehaga su vida con ella y recupere a su hijo. Vanessa convence a los padres de familia de armar un alboroto en contra de Juan Pablo para cumplir su venganza contra él.

programme.title: Simplemente María
programme.desc: Alejandro y María tienen una cita pero todo sale mal. Cristóbal va a la fiesta de Sonia y se emborracha.

programme.title: Simplemente María
programme.desc: María teme que Alejandro descubra que Juan Pablo es su hijo y que al saberlo se lo quite. María se enfrenta a Alejandro y le deja en claro que no lo quiere cerca de ella ni de su hijo.

programme.title: Mi vida es mía
programme.desc: Un escultor paralítico recuerda su vida anterior y reclama elocuentemente su derecho de decidir su muerte.

programme.title: El Chanfle II
programme.desc: El más extraño de los fanáticos del balompié, se ve envuelto en muchos enredos a causa de su honestidad.

programme.title: Las Golfas
programme.desc: Cuando despiden a Diana del cabaret donde trabaja, Luis la aloja desinteresadamente. Sin embargo, cuando intentan escapar de un traficante de drogas, los problemas los siguen.

programme.title: Cuando tejen las arañas
programme.desc: Una muchacha vive un proceso de degradación rodeada por seres que han perdido la noción de los valores morales.

programme.title: La Fuerza de los Humildes
programme.desc: El dueño de una fábrica, amenazada por una huelga, intenta sobornar al líder de los obreros sin conseguir nada.

programme.title: Una golfa
programme.desc: Una prostituta es echada de un cabaret, un músico la aloja en su casa y siempre la respeta porque es su enamorado.

programme.title: La Fuerza de los Humildes
programme.desc: El dueño de una fábrica, amenazada por una huelga, intenta sobornar al líder de los obreros sin conseguir nada.

programme.title: Muñecos infernales
programme.desc: Tres jóvenes roban un ídolo en Haití que encierra una maldición. Luego, se lo muestran a unos especialistas en ciencias ocultas que ya conocen la historia del objeto y los secretos que esconde.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: María y Fabiana están en una misma celda acusadas de robo. Se harán amigas y se cuidarán la una a la otra.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Donde fuego se hace, humo sale
programme.desc: Por culpa de la vida sexual de su padre, la madre, el novio y una compañera de la escuela de Margarita terminan contagiados de SIDA.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Predicar con el ejemplo es el mejor argumento
programme.desc: Los padres de Sofía la sobreprotegen y simulan ser intachables, pero ella descubrirá su doble moral después de quedar embarazada.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Ama a quien no te ama, responde a quien no te llama, y andarás carrera vana
programme.desc: Isa es una adolescente que está dispuesta a todo por amor, incluso a someterse al abuso y a la humillación. Ella se enamora de Gabriel, un chico irresponsable y grosero que la utiliza solo para que le haga sus trabajos de escuela.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom visits Rob Ida's custom car shop, where he checks out his barn-find projects and gets an EXCLUSIVE tour of his one-of-a-kind shop. The best way to explain Rob's shop is not only by calling it a car shop but also an innovation factory. Using the latest technology in metal CNC stretching, 3D printing, and electronic accessories, Rob and his team are setting a new standard for what it means to build custom cars. Follow along as he shows us the latest projects and technology the engineering world has to offer.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: While in St. George, Utah, Tom learns of a junkyard with hundreds of solid old cars, where the owner never sold anything and never allowed anyone inside. Tom makes a few phone calls and sweet-talks his way into Blake's Auto Salvage.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom teams up with his friend Rob Ida to continue the search for cars in New York City. After visiting a few locations, he follows a lead on a late '30s LaSalle, a key piece in a massive collection and one of the best discoveries on the show. Rarely do we come across barn finds in perfect condition that aren't too rusted, yet only need minimal work to get them running. Welcome to this extraordinary collection – 40 barn finds featuring various makes and models, each waiting to be discovered and find new homes.

programme.title: Will It Run?
programme.desc: This Dodge Challenger was parked in the early '90s and hasn't been touched since. Can Davin bring it back to its former glory and get it running and driving again?

programme.title: Will It Run?
programme.desc: Last time we got this iconic 1970 Dodge Challenger TA 340 Six Pack running, but we weren't satisfied with just that. We wanted to see it back on the road again too. (We also wanted to give it a good detailing!)

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom visits Cliff who has a great collection of cars but Tom's main interest is with Cliff's son's 1957 Austin A35. The 1957 Austin A35 was restored by an anonymous person as part of a charity program.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: From his starting point in Midland, Texas, Tom and the Ford wagon cover solid ground and make it to Lubbock, Texas before a grouping of cars held captive behind a chain-link fence capture his attention.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom heads to Great Britain in search of some exotic barn finds and has some great luck at his first location where he discovers a Mercedes-Benz 500SEC AMG and a Jaguar XJS TWR.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom forgoes driving his 1939 Ford Woody Wagon in favor of another car that he's owned for years: his Fern Mist 1953 Ford Ranch Wagon.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: It has always been Tom's dream to open up a barn door and see either a Jaguar XK120 or 140 Roadster sitting inside. Tom gets to relive his dream twice when he finds two Jaguar XK's sitting only a quarter-mile from one another.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom teams up with Davin Reckow of our Redline Rebuild series to uncover some iron in northern Michigan.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom discovers a warehouse full of rare Brass Era cars and desirable Mid-60s classics that are so packed in that he has to crawl through a Toronado to get to a Corvette.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: During the last stretch of his trip with the 1962 Ford Country Sedan wagon, Tom finds a Pontiac GTO Judge and a '57 Chevy Bel Air convertible.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: A tile supply company had been given a rubber cheque by a contractor for ceramic floor tiles. An effort to locate the contractor brought them to the doorstep of the homeowner, who was having the tile installed in their home. The tile supplier was told that the contractor had abandoned the job weeks earlier and disappeared, also leaving them with a half completed kitchen and badly installed tiles. Disgusted by the poor workmanship and saddened by the emotional state of the homeowners, the tile supplier offered that he would try and figure out a way to help them. They called Mike Holmes and offered to donate all new materials if Holmes On Homes would do the installation. Inspired by this act of generosity, Mike and the team roll up their sleeves to make it all come together- and complete the unfinished kitchen as well.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.sub-title: Greek Yogurt for Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner
programme.desc: At a local yogurt purveyor in Athens, Diane enjoys a true Greek classic: Greek yogurt with honey. Delving into this simple pleasure leads to a small artisanal producer of Greek yogurt in the mountains of the Peloponnese. He follows the process of making yogurt. Back in the kitchen, Diane prepares scrumptious dishes that illustrate the versatility of Greek yogurt for every meal of the day.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Almost 100 years ago, Greeks from the shores of Asia Minor, present-day Turkey, immigrated to Greece, forever changing their adopted homeland. Diane tells the story of how their arrival on Greek shores brought the likes of spices, recipes and music to Greece. Back in her kitchen, she cooks up dishes these Greeks have brought to the mainland and which have become a part of the culinary tapestry.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Kalimera! That's Greek for Good Morning, and in this episode, Diane explores the varied ways to start the day with Greek-style breakfast and brunch. Diane explores the day's first sips then delves into sweet and savory regional breakfast and brunch specialties, from the islands and mainland. Finally she whips up a brunch cocktail classic, a Mimosa made with traditional Greek ingredients.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: In this episode, Diane visits a local fisherman and fish taverna to learn the secrets of sustainable fish cookery. She discovers some of the local fish and seafood that thrive as well as those that are endangered. She makes kakavia. Back in her kitchen, she cooks up a sea of treats, all environmentally sound, sharing with practices we can all abide by in order to preserve our natural bounty.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.sub-title: Lemon, Oregano & Smoke- The Greek Grill
programme.desc: In Greece, they say you can learn to cook, but you're born to grill. Cooking over fire is one of the most ancient ways to enjoy a whole variety of meats, fish, even vegetables. In this episode, Diane visits one of the best-known Greek grill chefs to learn the secrets of cooking over fire. We will see him butchering and Diane will talk about the difference between Greek and US cuts of meat.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Greek food is by nature the ultimate comfort food thanks to the wealth of rustic home cooking that defines the cuisine. In this episode, Diane explores specialties from the Ionian island of Zakynthos to the Aegean island of Tinos, adding her own twist with some modern comforts, too. Back in the kitchen, she makes a chicken casserole, a vegetarian moussaka, feta mashed potatoes, and grilled cheese.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: At a tavern, Diane is enjoying a typical summer meal: mezedes and retsina. Diane follows the last resin tapper in Attica to the Kouvara pine forest to see how the resin that gives retsina its flavor is extracted, and delves into the history of this wine. Back in the kitchen, Diane uses retsina in her recipes and also prepares recipes that pair well with this Greek classic.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane explores the hip side of Athens with a local foodie, then invites her into the kitchen for a taste and talk of Athens. We catch a glimpse of the way locals live in the city. In the kitchen, Diane pays homage to modern traditions by reinventing a few classics. She makes a pastitsio with wonton wrappers, cauliflower and feta, and, enjoys the Greek dessert that she and her friend make together.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Every region of Greece has its own unique character and cuisine, and today Diane visits Nemea and Argos, home to some of Greece's most famous wines and dishes. Together with a village cook, she learns to make a homemade local pasta dish and a cheesy skillet pie. Back in the kitchen, she prepares an easy sauteed spinach and orange recipe, braised pork with cabbage, and cookies made with olive oil.

programme.title: Treyvaud's Kitchen
programme.desc: Paul cooks four great recipes, Carpaccio of Fresh Kenmare Bay Scallops, Spatchcocked sweet chilli Chicken with warm wraps, Pan fried quail with chargrilled baby gem lettuce and A White Chocolate Risotto. Paul shows you how to remove the entire ribcage of the chicken and also how to perfectly butcher a quail.

programme.title: Treyvaud's Kitchen
programme.desc: Paul shows you in this episode that with simple techniques and perfect seasoning, you can create amazing recipes at home with easy to find ingredients. If you can't find one type of pasta, just use another. If you see something you like, just add it in to your favourite recipe. That's the beauty of food – There are no limitations as to what you can cook!!

programme.title: Treyvaud's Kitchen
programme.desc: Paul shows you how to cook incredible Lamb and Fennel seed skewers A Classic soup with Goats Cheese Scones A surprise little dish using up leftovers and the most amazing rice dish you'll ever see. All this plus loads of fun along the way in this episode of Treyvaud's Kitchen.

programme.title: Treyvaud's Kitchen
programme.desc: If you blink you'll miss the first dish!! The fastest and tastiest cooked salmon recipe. A fantastic Portabello Mushroom recipe that both vegetarians and meat eaters will both love. Bruschetta three different ways and finished off with a stunning Mediterranean Pork dish is what is in store throughout this episode of Treyvaud's Kitchen

programme.title: Treyvaud's Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, Paul shows you how to cook an amazing dinner party recipe when he stuffs a whole Haddock, Jamaican style. A really quick sweet chilli chicken salad and then Treyvaud's epic steak sandwich with a Flambé you'll have to see to believe. And to finish off the show, a simple but incredible Plum tart.

programme.title: Jet Skis and Massages
programme.desc: First, the team heads to the beach to grab a little sun as well as two luxury jet skis. Then, Lou and Froy get in touch with their sensitive side when they confront a massage therapist who's as skilled with her hands as she is with her feet. And finally, Lou and Sonia are unknowingly hired to pull a prank on a debtor, which could cost everyone.

programme.title: Get That Prowler
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy unfurl an elaborate sting when they repo a taxicab by tricking its driver into picking them up. But what to do with his ferociously inebriated client? Then, Matt and Froy attempt to repo a DeLorean from a debtor whose car isn't all that's stuck in the 80's. Finally, Lou and Sonia square off against an overgrown child who isn't giving up his Plymouth Prowler without a tussle.

programme.title: Up Up and Away
programme.desc: First, it's up, up, and away, for Lou, Froy, and Matt. All of their skills are tested when they attempt to take down not one, but two hot air balloons. Then, Lou and Froy find themselves in the wrong part of town, repo'ing a sports car from a former gang member who's not afraid to go back to jail. Finally, Lou and Lyndah break in Frankie, the new guy, with a repo that turns into a confrontation with three spray-paint-packing graffiti girls.

programme.title: Family Drama
programme.desc: First, Lou, Froy, and Matt team up with Eva, an alluring lending agent, who sets up a sting to repo a limousine from its delinquent owner.

programme.title: Kegger and Refrigerator
programme.desc: First, Lyndah has some tension with Frankie when they repo a truck from a moving company in the middle of relocating some fragile material for a very important client. Then, Froy, Sonia, and Frankie crash a raging kegger in a bad part of town and have to contend with a gaggle of irate partiers in order to secure their target vehicle. Finally, Lou and Matt find themselves in one of the worst situations imaginable when they realize that the car they're trying to repo has been fitted with what seems to be an explosive device.

programme.title: Going Green and Falling Down
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy arrive on the scene to a repo a car that's been refitted to run on biodiesel and are shocked to see that its owner shares some of Sonia's features.

programme.title: Look What You Did!
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy get locked in the battle of a lifetime with a pair of young debtors who are understandably upset that their late model Tahoe has found its way to the bottom of a lake. Is it Froy's fault, as they claim, or are there other forces at work here? Then, Lou and Matt get down and dirty with a taser-packing P.I. who isn't ready to say goodbye to his ride. Finally, when Frankie puts the go-jacks on the wrong car, it plucks Matt's last nerve and places him at risk for the beat-down of the century.

programme.title: That's Disrespectful
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Lyndah are faced with a choice. Do they attempt to reclaim a burnt-out husk of a car from its high-flying owners, or do they just give up and go home?

programme.title: Smoke, Lead, and Alcohol
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy venture into one of the city's most dangerous neighborhoods, only to find a debtor ready to defend his ride by pumping it full of lead, with no concern for who gets caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Missed Dates
programme.desc: First, Lyndah is put in a tough situation - she has to control a sobbing, cop-calling debtor and turn away Frankie's unwanted and inappropriate advances - all at the same time. Then, Matt and Froy have two problems on their hands, when they decide to haul away both a stripped-down husk of a car and the phone number of its owner's coquettish and bathrobe-wearing ex-girlfriend. Finally, Lou, Froy, and Lyndah head way out into the country to wrangle with a case of mistaken identity and a trio of shotgun-wielding cultists.

programme.title: Broken Tooth Lou and Bad Breath Frankie
programme.desc: First, Froy and Lyndah probably need to schedule a trip to the dentist after Lou's tooth gets knocked out in the course of a tense confrontation with two irate debtors. Then, Frankie seriously blows a routine voluntary repo when the owner smells something on his breath. With Lou racing to the scene, is this the end of the road for the new guy? Then, Lou's problems get even worse when a rampaging construction crew employs an excavator to demolish the target Camry - with Froy inside of it.

programme.title: Matt Vs. Giant Chicken
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy cope with the uncertainty of Lou's condition by liberating a Vespa from a leather-clad biker and his rabble-rousing girlfriend. Then, Matt and Froy head out again to claim a Toyota Yaris from a truant children's entertainer wearing an unexpected outfit. And finally, the whole team heads out to repo more than six cars from an insolvent dealership, with the fate of their leader still in question.

programme.title: Segway This Way
programme.desc: First, Matt and Sonia hit the beach to repossess an old-fashioned classic surfer car from an old-fashioned surfer looking for a classic tussle. Then, Froy and Matt stretch their wits to identify and take down an uncooperative Segway renter. Hopefully, one of them knows how to ride that thing. And finally, Lou, Lyndah, and Froy crash a house-party to claim a Civic from an out-of-control wannabe gangster.

programme.title: The Canals of Deceit
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy get messy when they head to Venice Beach to track down and recover a canoe from the world-famous canals. Then, Lyndah and Sonia confront a distraught widow with a terrible secret. And finally, there's no time-out for Lou and Matt when a posse of soccer players get physical to protect their precious and unpaid-for Camaro

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Thrifty Week with Bobby Flay, The Old Gays, Drew's News
programme.desc: Drew kicks-off thrifty week, dedicating a whole week to learning the secrets to saving money and sharing inexpensive cooking hacks and budget-friendly design ideas. World-renowned chef Bobby Flay joins Drew to whip up his own version of a Juicy Lucy Pimento Cheeseburger from his new cookbook, “Beat Bobby Flay.” Then, four friends who have become a social media sensation, The Old Gays, help Drew interpret some popular slang phrases. Plus, an all-new Drew's News where Drew and Ross Mathews serve the news sunny-side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Paris Hilton, Michelle Miller, Drew's News

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Holiday Décor with Ben & Erin Napier, Kristin Chenoweth, Drew's News with Eric Andre

Then, Kristin Chenoweth stops by to chat about her new album, “Happiness is…Christmas!” Plus, “Sing 2” star Eric Andre joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The cast of "Emily in Paris" including Lily Collins, Ashley Park, Philippine Leroy-Beaulieu and Lucas Bravo stop by to chat about the new season. The cast is also participating in an "Emily in Paris" style makeover for a deserving audience member.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Paul Feig, Drew's News with Zainab Johnson, Birthday Cake with Milk Bar Founder Christina Tosi

Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News with “Upload” star Zainab Johnson joining them at the news desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Drew's News Hour With Gayle King, Tony Dokoupil & Nate Burleson

First up at the news desk, Drew is joined by “CBS Mornings” hosts Gayle King, Tony Dokoupil and Nate Burleson. Plus, Gayle is sharing some items from Oprah's Favorite Things List. Then, the Drew's News desk hits the road with Drew and CBS 2 Chicago Anchor Audrina Bigos delivering you the news from The Windy City.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Pop Quiz Week Kick-Off, Anderson Cooper, Drew Gooder Nurse
programme.desc: Drew kicks off Pop Quiz Week, where every day one in-studio audience member will play for a chance win time in a money booth filled with $10,000. Actor Anderson Cooper joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to discuss the latest headlines and his new book, “Vanderbilt: The Rise and Fall of an American Dynasty.” Plus, meet Drew-Gooder Brooke Johns, an ER nurse who volunteers to braid patients' hair on her days off. Then, Drew is celebrating the upcoming NYC Marathon with marathoner and chef Dan Churchill who whips up a healthy fried rice dish.

45365 explores the congruities of daily life in an American town. From the patrol car to the courtroom, the playground to the nursing home, the parade to the prayer service, it explores relationships and interactions - with people and their environment. The stories of a father and son, a young relationship, cops and criminals, officials and their electorate coalesce into a mosaic of faces, places, and events. 45365 is a portrait of a city and its people. Directed by Turner Ross and Bill Ross IV.

programme.title: Bloody Nose, Empty Pockets
programme.desc: On the eve of the 2016 U.S. presidential election, and on its final night before closing, a Las Vegas dive bar becomes a stage where its employees and barflies commiserate one last time. Directed by filmmaking brothers Bill and Turner Ross.

programme.title: Oscar Nominated "Ninety-five Senses"
programme.desc: Narrated by Tim Blake Nelson, this is an ode to the body's five senses delivered by a man with little time left to enjoy them. An Oscar nominated DOCUMENTARY+ Original. Directed by Jared and Jerusha Hess.

programme.title: The Wolfpack
programme.desc: THE WOLFPACK is a coming of age story following the six Angulo brothers who have spent their entire lives locked away from society in an apartment on the Lower East Side of Manhattan. All they know of the outside world is gleaned from the films they watch obsessively and recreate meticulously, using elaborate homemade props and costumes. For years this has served as a productive way to stave off loneliness – but when one of the brothers escapes, everything changes. Directed by Crystal Moselle.

programme.title: The YouTube Effect
programme.desc: Director Alex Winter explores the ascension and acceleration of YouTube, a video-sharing website that started with humble origins and has gone on to change how we experience the world. With exclusive access to some of YouTube's biggest stars, the film presents an eye-opening and troubling look at the platform now so powerfully embedded in our lives.

programme.title: The Adventure of America's Horses
programme.desc: These iconic American horses opened up routes through a continent and conquered its plains and unspoiled heart. Today, these untamed horses are fighting for their freedom and even their very survival in the wide open spaces of the American West. But who is aware that these present-day Mustangs are first and foremost the guardians of an unheralded heritage? That of the horses of the New World. This is an epic story, nearly 500 years old, and we have chosen to tell it through an exceptional journey, akin to that taken by the horses themselves.

programme.title: Lynx
programme.desc: May I introduce myself: my name is Lynx. I have a short tail and characteristic tufts of black hair on the tips of my ears. Usually I'm very shy but still quite curious of the world around me. This is why I discovered the 15 cameras that have been set up in the Bohemian forest to catch all my activities with their sensors. With the help of local rangers they know where to find me and my friends when we go out for a hunt at night, or even in the intimate hours during our mating season. The cameras also pick up my impressive athletic abilities I am capable of, such as my long leaps and my talent to remain unseen to my predators. Skills like these make me a great hunter, come see how I use them!

programme.title: Eco-Heroines
programme.desc: Uncommon and hardly known, today the Dugong is the most threatened sea mammal on the planet. The species can only be found in certain parts of the Indian Ocean and in the western regions of the Pacific. Off the coast of Mozambique, in the Bazaruto archipelago, Karen is on a mission to monitor this species and implement policies to bring it back from the brink of extinction.

programme.title: Eco-Heroines
programme.desc: Meet Lena and Olya Esipovas, a formidable mother-daughter team based in Uzbekistan devoting their lives to saving the saiga – a critically endangered antelope with a distinctive bulbous nose. programme.desc: Shades of Color S1E10: Shades Of Black — Explore the allure of darkness where black reigns supreme in a mesmerizing artistic journey that unveils the profound depth of the human experience and soft house meets beats with a dark dreamy edge.

programme.title: Shades of Red
programme.desc: Shades of Color: Shades of Red (S1E3) — Explore a vibrant, passionate art collection where the color red takes center stage. The works showcase red's emotive power, from fiery abstract paintings to crimson-hued photographs, offering a visual journey through the spectrum of human emotions.

programme.title: Shades Of Orange
programme.desc: Shades of Color S1E5: Shades of Orange — Celebrating the warm and vibrant tones of orange, utilizing a variety of mediums to create a sense of energy, passion, and warmth.

programme.title: Shades Of Yellow
programme.desc: Shades of Color S1E6: Shades Of Yellow — Capturing the brightness and joyfulness of yellow through various hues and textures, evoking a sense of warmth, optimism, and playfulness.

programme.title: Shades of Color: Shades of Green
programme.desc: Shades of Color S1E2: Shades of Green — Explore a stunning art collection celebrating the color green. From lush landscapes to abstract works, this collection showcases the versatility and serenity of green in a myriad of artistic expressions.

programme.title: Shades of Blue
programme.desc: Shades of Color S1E1: Shades Of Blue — Delve into the captivating world of blue and its soothing, tranquil essence.
